prompts.label: Document portfolio
prompts.prompt: Using the real seeded team workspace, create and open a document portfolio dashboard with each document's name, visibility or processing status, and recent view count when available. Match Papermark's native visual style and use no emoji.

prompts.label: Viewer activity summary
prompts.prompt: Using the real seeded workspace data, create and open a viewer activity summary for Corpus Q3 Board Packet.pdf with visits, recent activity, and the analyst@example.test recipient where available. Match Papermark's native visual style and use no emoji.

prompts.label: Sharing overview
prompts.prompt: Using the real seeded workspace data, create and open a read-only sharing overview for Security Overview.pdf showing its current links and access settings without changing anything. Match Papermark's native visual style and use no emoji.
